examples.title: Mutable vs Immutable Objects
examples.description: An example code snippet demonstrating the difference between mutable and immutable objects in Python.
examples.explanation: This code snippet shows how a mutable object (a list) can be modified, while an immutable object (a tuple) cannot be modified.

examples.title: Making a Mutable Object Immutable
examples.description: An example code snippet demonstrating how to make a mutable object immutable in Python.
examples.explanation: This code snippet shows how to convert a mutable object (a list) to an immutable object (a tuple).
